======= RMA01775William Arthur Rawlins papers21-23-1775Compiled by S.LipskyDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
June 20042B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:
cals agric entomThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:18:26 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)2007-05-29
converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
William Arthur Rawlins papers
Rawlins, William Arthur, 1908- (Affiliation: (Cornell University Class of 1930, Ph.D. 1936).)
21-23-1775
8 cubic feet. 8 cubic feet.
1930-1972 Undated Correspondence, reports, data books, radio talks, handbooks, course material, papers. Papers include general correspondence, and correspondence and reports from Rawlins' work with the Food and Agricultural Organization's Mission to Poland and with the Ford Foundation in India. Collection material in English 2074840
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
S.Lipsky
Date completed:
February 1980
EAD encoding:
Ann Hubert, June 2004
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Entomologist; professor of entomology, Cornell University.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Papers include general correspondence (1930-1972), and correspondence and general reports from Rawlins' work with the Food and Agricultural Organization's Mission to Poland (1947, 1951-1952), and with the Ford Foundation in India (1967-1970); reports, the majority on potato disease, lettuce yellows, aster yellows and carrot rust fly control; data books recording the progress of various potato experiments (1937-1958); county agents' school reports; and miscellaneous radio talks, senate testimony, handbooks, and course material.
Cite As:
William Arthur Rawlins papers, #21-23-1775. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
College teachers. Entomologists. India. Poland -- Agriculture. Entomology. Plant diseases. Agricultural pests. Agriculture. Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations. Mission to Poland Ford Foundation Cornell University -- : Faculty.
